title: LastPass Users - REKT
relevance_summary: Phishing attack on LastPass users leading to seed phrase exposure and subsequent theft of funds

prevention.rule: Block any tx that accesses seed phrases or private keys from a compromised LastPass account

red_flags: Primary theft txns are almost always between 10am–4pm UTC
Attacker swaps tokens for ETH inside wallet before sending ETH out
Funds are eventually sent to CEXs such as FixedFloat, SimpleSwap, SideShift, ChangeNOW, LetsExchange
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that accesses seed phrases or private keys from a compromised LastPass account
summary: A phishing attack on LastPass users led to the exposure of seed phrases and subsequent theft of over $37M across multiple chains. A guard could have prevented this by blocking transactions accessing seed phrases or private keys from compromised LastPass accounts.
